title: One Piece Bosses - Mine Piece X Mine Mine no Mi Addon
description: Addon to use the mine piece bosses on the mine mine no mi game system, working with One Piece World Like
body:
Mine Piece Boss Integration Addon

Bring the iconic Mine Piece bosses into the immersive world generation and progression system of One Piece World Like.

This addon seamlessly integrates Mine Piece bosses with the One Piece World Like island system, allowing bosses to spawn naturally across the world while preserving the exploration, sailing, and adventure experience inspired by the One Piece universe. Travel between islands, discover powerful enemies, challenge legendary bosses, and progress through your journey using the Mine Piece game mechanics.

Features
⚔️ Mine Piece bosses integrated into One Piece World Like islands

🏝️ Natural boss progression tied to world exploration

🌊 Compatible with island generation, Red Line, Calm Belts, and Reverse Mountain

👑 Encounter famous bosses while sailing through the Grand Line

🎮 Designed to enhance the Mine Piece gameplay experience without replacing it

🔧 Lightweight and easy to install alongside both mods

Whether you're hunting for rare drops, testing your strength, or simply looking for a more authentic One Piece adventure, this addon makes the world feel alive with powerful enemies waiting to challenge every pirate.

Required Mods: One Piece World Like + Mine Piece + Mine Mine No Mi. (Works with HakMinePiece and Mmnm addons)
